description: You are the IT manager of an AV equipment installation company that uses FreeScout for managing field service tickets. Log in as admin (admin@helpdesk.local, password: Admin123!) and configure user access permissions for the 'Field Service' mailbox. Grant access to Sarah Chen (tech_sarah@helpdesk.local), a senior technician who needs to handle escalated repair tickets, and ensure Marcus Rivera (tech_marcus@helpdesk.local), who was reassigned to warehouse operations, does not have access to the mailbox.
